author: anon-581fd578
content:
Fixed all three issues:

1. Double-typed text: Reverted glyph bearing pos/size patch. The cosmic-text glyph positions are already correct — adding bitmap bearing offsets shifted glyphs incorrectly creating ghost/echo effect.

2. Interactive state: build_widget_tree now preserves the scope across rebuilds (creates once, uses run_in_scope for subsequent frames). Kitchen sink uses use_persisted() helper with thread_local keyed cache + create_unscoped_signal for all interactive signals.

3. Style page: was already rendering color swatches correctly — the bearing patch was distorting all text making it hard to read.
